description: Architected and deployed a full-scale web platform using Next.js, incorporating a secure admin panel, customized 3D configuration tools, and internal API tracking systems.
highlights: Architected and deployed a full-scale web platform using Next.js, including a secure admin dashboard with role-based access and data management
Developed an interactive 3D Van Configurator using Three.js, enabling real-time customization with camera controls, animations, and user submissions
Implemented a booking and consultation system, improving customer engagement and scheduling efficiency
Built a ClickUp API integration tool to track real-time vs manual time logs, improving productivity monitoring and eliminating reporting errors
Designed and launched a service portfolio website to increase client acquisition

description: Developed advanced MERN stack and frontend web applications, focusing on booking ecosystems, high-performance 3D components rendering, and custom workflow automation solutions.
highlights: Developed wedX.com — a full-stack wedding venue booking platform with separate dashboards for vendors and users, a booking management system, a login/auth system, and real-time availability

Developed a modern CNC machining platform with interactive UI and 3D visualization of components using Three.js, implementing dynamic material selection (Aluminium, Steel, Acrylic) and high-performance rendering
Developed Gawahi Healthcare — a custom hospital management system allowing doctors to record, save, and retrieve complete patient history, replacing a manual Google Sheets workflow
Built MERN stack applications with secure APIs, JWT authentication, MongoDB integration, and Stripe payment processing
